CHAMP-BERSERKER.title: Berserker
CHAMP-COMBO.title: Combo
CHAMP-COMBO.description: Extra effect when played in the listed [gold]Stance[/gold].
CHAMP-DEFENSIVE.title: Defensive
CHAMP-FINISHER.title: Finisher
CHAMP-FINISHER.description:
Requires a [gold]Stance[/gold].
After playing a Finisher, exit your Stance and trigger its Finisher bonus.
CHAMP-STANCE.title: Stance
CHAMP-STANCE.description: You may have only one Stance at a time.
CHAMP-ULTIMATE.title: Ultimate
CHAMP-ULTIMATE.description:
[gold]Stance[/gold]. Counts as both [gold]Defensive[/gold] and [gold]Berserker[/gold] Stances.
If you leave this Stance in this turn, immediately re-enter it.
At the end of your turn, exit this Stance.
